[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@global-torque/content-toolkit](./content-toolkit.md)

## content-toolkit package

Product-neutral contracts and deterministic helpers for normalizing, indexing, sorting, and traversing host-provided content records.

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[DuplicateContentPathError](./content-toolkit.duplicatecontentpatherror.md)


</td><td>

Typed failure for a normalized tree, URL, or source-path collision.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[MissingContentPathError](./content-toolkit.missingcontentpatherror.md)


</td><td>

Typed failure for missing record paths or required tree lookups.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

<table><thead><tr><th>

Function


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[createContentTree(items, options)](./content-toolkit.createcontenttree.md)


</td><td>

Create a detached, deeply immutable tree and indexes from content records.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createImageSrcset(input)](./content-toolkit.createimagesrcset.md)


</td><td>

Build a deterministic width-descriptor srcset from host-owned variants.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[filterByArrayValue(key, value)](./content-toolkit.filterbyarrayvalue.md)


</td><td>

Create a filter that matches an element in an array-valued field.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[filterByKeyValue(key, value)](./content-toolkit.filterbykeyvalue.md)


</td><td>

Create an equality filter for a typed record field.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[filterByNotKeyValue(key, value)](./content-toolkit.filterbynotkeyvalue.md)


</td><td>

Create an inequality filter for a typed record field.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[filterPages(data, key, value)](./content-toolkit.filterpages.md)


</td><td>

Select a field value, remove drafts, and return highest-order records first.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[filterPagesNot(data, key, value)](./content-toolkit.filterpagesnot.md)


</td><td>

Exclude a field value, remove drafts, and return highest-order records first.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[filterSingle(data, key, value)](./content-toolkit.filtersingle.md)


</td><td>

Return the highest-order non-draft record matching a field value.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[formatContentPath(value, options)](./content-toolkit.formatcontentpath.md)


</td><td>

Format only the path portion of a relative or root-absolute content reference. Unicode and valid percent escapes are preserved byte-for-byte unless a host explicitly supplies a segment transform.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[getPages(data, filterFuncs, sortFuncs)](./content-toolkit.getpages.md)


</td><td>

Exclude drafts, then apply filters and sorters without mutating the input.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[normalizeContentPath(path, options)](./content-toolkit.normalizecontentpath.md)


</td><td>

Normalize a root-absolute tree path and apply the configured index policy.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[normalizeFrontmatter(pageData, options)](./content-toolkit.normalizefrontmatter.md)


</td><td>

Return a detached normalized record without mutating page data or frontmatter.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[sortByDate(data, key, order)](./content-toolkit.sortbydate.md)


</td><td>

Stable-sort records by a selected date-like field and place invalid dates last.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[sortByOrderAscending(data)](./content-toolkit.sortbyorderascending.md)


</td><td>

Stable-sort records by optional numeric order from low to high.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[sortByOrderDescending(data)](./content-toolkit.sortbyorderdescending.md)


</td><td>

Stable-sort records by optional numeric order from high to low.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[sortByPublishDateDescending(data)](./content-toolkit.sortbypublishdatedescending.md)


</td><td>

Stable-sort publishable records newest first and place invalid dates last.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[splitContentPath(path, normalizePath)](./content-toolkit.splitcontentpath.md)


</td><td>

Normalize a tree path once and split it into non-empty segments.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[splitContentPathReference(value)](./content-toolkit.splitcontentpathreference.md)


</td><td>

Split a path reference without decoding or normalizing any component.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

Host-defined image variant used to create a width-descriptor srcset.
